life_events: Fiancé has been through the described hardships in cycles; great communicator except about himself

text: My fiancé is Taurus rising with Chiron and mars in the 1H, Venus in 3H, NN in 4H, Saturn in 6H. And he has been through all of the above in cycles. But I am trying to convince him to talk about it because his sun is in his 2H in Gemini he’s a great communicator but not about himself. He is my favorite person. Our dream is to be the reason our loved ones don’t have to understand poverty but with also remaining in our own peace.

dreams: The ability to let others see themselves and their highest selves through her lens
lessons_attracted: Used to attract people who needed fixing and used her insecurities against her; with better boundaries now attracts independent people who actively choose her
notes: NN at 0 degrees
text: Hiyyyaaa. Taurus rising here 🥰 my Venus is in Cancer in the 3rd house, North Node in Capricorn in the 9th house (0 degrees), and my Saturn is in Aquarius in the 10th house. If I could have anything, it would be to have the ability to let others see themselves (and others) through my lense, I feel like I can truly see what someone’s highest self is, how genuine, kind, warm, smart, loving, strong, resilient, and beautiful they can be, I can also see your strengths and weaknesses. On the flip side I can also see when someone is projecting their “highest self”- but it’s complete sh*t. When they’re completely unaligned, the “black hole” that they have created of their energy, and how they have become a human succubus. I use to attract people who needed “fixed,” someone who needed me, my light, my kindness, and then would use my insecurities against me at any point they were mad at me. I am now at a new point in life where, because I have better boundaries- still working on them lol- I no longer attract that. I now attract goal oriented, smart, independent people who don’t NEED anything from me, but people who ACTIVELY choose to have me in their lives. 💜

dreams: Become a doctor (feels it's her purpose); security and stability; keep loved ones safe and help them freely; build a special-education school; leave a positive legacy
lessons_attracted: Mental strength from repeated struggle; learning connection, vulnerability and boundaries; stepping into responsibility before feeling ready during Saturn return
life_events: Healing from major past traumas; repeated med-school graduation delays from health and life affecting grades
notes: Saturn with Jupiter; Saturn-dominant (Aquarius stellium 10H, Cap moon 9H); in Saturn return
text: Taurus Rising. Pisces Venus 11H, Saturn Aries 12H (with Jupiter), North Node Leo 4H. I don't know if my struggle is on the level you are looking for but I've been healing from huge traumas in my past and have been facing repeated delays in my graduation from med school bc of health and life affecting my grades. My biggest dream is to become a doctor more than anything, I truly think it's my purpose to help people. But underlying that I seek security and stability more than anything and I just want to be in a position where all my loved ones are safe and I can afford to help them freely while not compromising my own needs and passions, I also want to have a positive impact/legacy on the world and my community, especially to build something for the children in my life (nephews), it's my dream to put up a Special Education school. In terms of lessons, I have become really mentally strong over the past few years from healing, gaining strength from repeated struggle, I have been learning how I relate to people (I have always struggled with connection, vulnerability, boundaries), I am also learning to be secure against change and struggle and feel less weak against what life throws at me. Since it's also my Saturn return, I have been put into positions lately where I have to step up and take on more responsibility than I feel ready for. I have struggled with self-doubt and feeling small and uncertain all my life so it feels like life is trying to beat that out of me by throwing hardship at me. I am also Saturn dominant (Aqua stellium 10H, Cap moon 9H)

notes: Saturn at 0°; houses as stated (not whole-sign consistent — possibly Placidus); Aqua MC with Uranus and Lilith; personal planets in 12th and 8th, Pluto in 7th
text: Taurus Rising, Venus 11th house in Aries, North node in Cancer 2nd house, Saturn in Gemini 1st house at 0 degrees, also have some personal planets on 12th and 8th plus i also have Pluto in the 7th. Life has been a constant death and rebirth for me where I have to go through intense loss (especially in friendships and relationships) and coming out of it stronger and wiser. Lessons of attachment and self worth have been a key theme as well. The battle between wanting to shine because you know to yourself you’re talented but then afraid to shine too much in fear of being really seen so you stay by the sidelines. Doesn’t help that I also have Aqua MC with Uranus and Lilith sitting there. Career decisions of wanting the noble path yet in my hearts of heart, I just wanna study and become an astrologer too or do something for a bigger cause but I just haven’t figured it out yet. I know Im meant for greater things, its just really a battle within my own shadow and not loosing myself to other people in the process. So yeah 🤗

dreams: To do absolutely nothing but live — a beautiful home, waking whenever she wants, wonderful food, making music, painting, being outside and swimming; a stress-free life that doesn't require work
lessons_attracted: Conditioned to help people (eldest daughter); refuses to live a life she isn't happy with
life_events: Grew up in poverty; at 26 will be the first in her family with a bachelor's degree; pursuing social work without a sense of direction
notes: Saturn retrograde, given as Taurus 12H; NN given as 3rd/4th (4th used)
text: Taurus rising, venus virgo 5th house, Leo NN 3rd/4th house, Saturn rx 12H in Taurus. My dream is to do absolutely nothing but live. I don’t have a dream job or career, I don’t want to work at all. I want to live in a beautiful home, I want to wake up whenever I want, I want to eat wonderful food, I want to make music, I want to paint, I want to be outside and swim, I want to talk to people all the time, I want to have a stress free life that doesn’t require me to work. I grew up in poverty, I’m 26 now and will be the first person in my family with a Bachelor’s degree. I don’t have any direction in life, I don’t know what I’m doing with my life. I think I’ve been conditioned to help people (eldest daughter/Aquarius 10H MC and South Node), and that’s the current path I’m on career wise (pursuing social work), but I genuinely just want to do nothing but live a life that revolves around me and what makes me happy. I have no idea how this is going to come into fruition, but I refuse to live a life that I am not happy with.
